reviews.review_description: Love to play as a VR Cashier in the Supermarket Simulator Store VR Cashier. Graphics are nice. Can be improved. Add more stores in the game. Make game little more challenging.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for sharing your experience with Supermarket Simulator Store: VR Cashier! We’re really glad to hear you enjoyed playing and found the VR cashier experience fun and immersive, along with the graphics.

We also appreciate your suggestions. Adding more stores and making the gameplay a bit more challenging are great ideas, and definitely things we keep in mind for future updates to improve the overall experience.

Your feedback is valuable and helps us continue improving Supermarket Simulator Store: VR Cashier step by step.

Thank you for sharing your feedback. We’re sorry to hear that your experience with the game was not enjoyable. Our team is actively working on improving the game day by day by fixing issues, optimizing performance, and enhancing the overall gameplay experience based on player feedback.

We understand that the game still has areas that need improvement, and feedback like yours helps us continue making the game better. Our goal is to provide a smoother, more enjoyable supermarket simulation experience with future updates and improvements.

We truly appreciate you trying the game, and we hope you’ll give it another chance after upcoming updates. If you notice improvements in the future, we would be grateful if you consider updating your rating as well.

reviews.review_title: Great game, just needs more content
reviews.review_description: Supermarket Simulator is genuinely addictive, I've been playing it way more than I expected lol. Running my own store, managing shelves and handling customers feels really satisfying. The overall gameplay is smooth and super easy. AI customers still need a bit of work though 😅 they can look a little off sometimes. More product variety and different shelf options would honestly make this a perfect game!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your amazing review and support! Reviews like yours truly motivate us to keep improving and creating even better experiences for our players.

We're glad you're enjoying the store management, shelf stocking, and customer interactions. We also appreciate your feedback about the AI customers, product variety, and shelf options—our team is actively working on improvements in these areas.

We're currently preparing an exciting new update packed with fresh content and enhancements, and we hope to release it very soon. Get ready—there's a lot more coming to Supermarket Simulator!

Thanks again for being part of our community and helping us make the game better.

reviews.review_description: The game people can be emprooved but they do look scary😅 And being a cashier in a game is scary. Other than the people (AI people) its great 😉😄🙃😃

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your feedback! 😊

We’re really happy to hear that you enjoyed the game overall and liked the cashier experience. It’s great to know that the core gameplay feels fun and engaging for you. 🎮

We also appreciate your honest thoughts about the AI customers. We understand that they might feel a bit intense or scary at times 😅 — especially in a cashier role. Your feedback is very helpful, and we’ll definitely look into improving their behavior and making interactions feel more natural and comfortable in future updates.

We’re currently working on new and exciting features! 😊
Our goal is to make the game more enjoyable, smoother, and even more immersive while keeping the experience fun and light.

Thanks again for playing and sharing your thoughts — your support really helps us improve! 😄🎮
